Package sudokusolver.sudoku.rules

package sudokusolver.sudoku.rules
Contains classes extending the abstract SudokuRule class.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    sudokusolver.sudoku
    Models the core domain, structural components, and high-level abstractions of a Sudoku puzzle.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AllDifferentRule
    Enforces the set of cells to hold different values.
    AllEqualRule
    Enforces the set of cells to hold the same value.
    AllowedPairsRule
    Enforces that the values of two cells belong to a specified set of allowed pairs.
    AllowedValuesRule
    Enforces that the values of a set of cells belong to a specified set of allowed values.
    AntiKnightRule
    Enforces that no two cells a knight's move apart can have the same value.
    ClassicRule
    Enforces the classic Sudoku rules for a square region.
    ConsecutiveRule
    Enforces that the values of cells connected by an edge are consecutive (differ by 1) only if the edge is marked as consecutive, and not consecutive otherwise.
    DiagonalRule
    Enforces that the values on both main diagonals of a square region are distinct.
    DotsRule
    Enforces that the values of cells connected by a white dot edge differ by 1, the values of cells connected by a black dot edge differ by a factor of 2, and the values of cells not connected by a white or black dot edge are not consecutive and do not differ by a factor of 2.
    EvenRule
    Enforces that specified cells can only obtain even values.
    KillerCageRule
    Enforces that the values in a specified set of cells must sum to a given value.
    OddRule
    Enforces that specified cells can only obtain odd values.
    PalindromeRule
    Enforces that the values in a specified list of cells form a palindrome, meaning that the k-th cell in the list must have the same value as the k-th cell from the end of the list for all k.
    RowsAndColumnsRule
    Enforces that the values in each row and column of a specified rectangle must be distinct.
    ThermoRule
    Enforces that the values in a specified list of cells form a "thermometer", meaning that the value in each cell must be strictly less than the value in the next cell in the list.
    XVRule
    Enforces that the values of cells connected by a V edge sum to 5, the values of cells connected by a X edge sum to 10, and the values of cells not connected by a V or X edge are don't sum to 5 or 10.
